arts.ttl: Paul Warne makes Derby County exit admission as Rams set for January departures
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Paul Warne admits Conor Washington could be among the "few players" who are set to leave Derby County his month.

arts.ttl: Jason Knight addresses Bristol City's dropped points after goal in draw with Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Jason Knight insists he and his Bristol City teammates are not concerned by their habit of dropping points from winning positions following their New Year's Day draw with Plymouth Argyle. Although Bristol City weren't able to get the win over the line, Knight's performance in the middle of the park alongside former Derby County teammate Max Bird was a real highlight at Home Park.

arts.sum: Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community. The development of Ashton Gate has also been a big driver of City's uplift in revenue, with football finance expert Kieran Maguire suggesting the Reds generate more revenue than any other club without parachute payments in the second tier.
